ai_coach.headline: Nothing logged today -- zero gym session, zero nutrition, zero weigh-in -- so tomorrow needs to close all three gaps.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No HRV, sleep, RHR, or body battery data synced, so readiness can't be assessed tonight. Treat tomorrow as a clean slate but don't assume recovery is fine just because there's no red flag data -- there's just no data.
action_plan: Log today's actual gym session in Hevy tonight if it happened, or schedule tomorrow's lift first thing to avoid a second missed day (adherence is currently 0/4 scheduled days this week).
Weigh in first thing tomorrow AM under consistent conditions to re-anchor the glide path.
Log tomorrow's meals in real time rather than after the fact so the 2750 kcal / 215g protein target can actually be tracked against intake.
Sync sleep/HRV/RHR tracker before bed so tomorrow's readiness read isn't another blank.
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Today shows 0 of the 2750 kcal / 215g protein / 310g carb Gym Lifting target logged -- if any food was eaten today it needs to be back-logged tonight, and tomorrow's pre/post-workout meals should carry 60% of the day's carbs per the standing directive.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight has been logged yet against the glide path toward 83.0 kg, so trend status is unknown until a weigh-in is recorded.
risk_flags: Zero gym adherence logged this week (0/4 scheduled days) -- this is an adherence gap, not just a data gap, if sessions were actually skipped.
Complete absence of telemetry (sleep, HRV, RHR, steps, body battery) makes it impossible to catch overreaching early -- close this before it becomes a blind spot.

overview.summary: Every metric -- weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, body battery -- is blank today, giving no basis to judge how the day actually went.
overview.suggestion: Sync the wearable and log weight tomorrow morning so tomorrow evening's review has real numbers to compare against.

plan.summary: No current weight or history means progress against the 83.0 kg target and phase milestones can't be evaluated tonight.
plan.suggestion: Get one weigh-in logged tomorrow AM to re-establish a data point on the glide path before the next milestone check.

training.summary: Scheduled gym days for the week stand at 0/4 logged, and with no readiness data to justify skipping, this looks like a straight adherence miss rather than a planned rest.
training.suggestion: Prioritize getting one full-body lifting session in tomorrow and log it immediately in Hevy to restart the weekly count.

gym.summary: No recent session data is available, so there's nothing to reference from the last lift or compare to the current split.
gym.suggestion: When the next session runs, log it in Hevy right after so working weights on the compound lifts can be tracked and protected as directed.

sleep.summary: No sleep, stress, or body-battery figures were captured last night, leaving recovery status unverified.
sleep.suggestion: Wear the tracker overnight and check body battery/stress on waking to inform tomorrow's training intensity call.

nutrition.summary: Zero calories, protein, carbs, or fat logged against the 2750 kcal / 215g protein Gym Lifting target for today.
nutrition.suggestion: Back-log anything eaten today now, and start tomorrow with a planned pre-workout meal to hit the 60% carb-pacing rule around training.
